hotels.name: The LINQ Hotel + Experience
hotels.address: 3535 Las Vegas Blvd S, Las Vegas, NV 89109

activities.name: Check-in and Lunch at Hash House A Go Go
activities.description: Settle into your hotel and grab lunch at this popular spot known for huge portions at reasonable prices

activities.name: Explore the Las Vegas Strip
activities.description: Walk the Strip and see iconic hotels like Bellagio, Caesars Palace, and The Venetian. Free activity!

activities.name: Bellagio Fountains Show
activities.description: Watch the famous choreographed fountain show set to music - completely free

activities.name: Dinner at Ellis Island Casino
activities.description: Budget-friendly dinner with their famous $9.99 steak special

activities.name: Breakfast at hotel
activities.description: Quick breakfast at hotel cafe

activities.name: Fremont Street Experience
activities.description: Visit Downtown Las Vegas to see the famous Fremont Street LED canopy, street performers, and vintage Vegas

activities.name: Lunch at Fremont Street
activities.description: Affordable lunch at one of the downtown casinos

activities.name: Container Park
activities.description: Explore this unique outdoor shopping area made from shipping containers with free entertainment

activities.name: Dinner at In-N-Out Burger
activities.description: Classic California burger chain - budget-friendly and delicious

activities.name: High Roller Observation Wheel
activities.description: Ride the world's tallest observation wheel for stunning views of the Strip at night

activities.name: Breakfast at hotel
activities.description: Breakfast at hotel cafe

activities.name: Red Rock Canyon National Conservation Area
activities.description: Half-day trip to stunning desert landscapes just 30 minutes from the Strip. Scenic drive and hiking trails

activities.name: Late Lunch at Tacos El Gordo
activities.description: Authentic and affordable Mexican food, a local favorite

activities.name: M&M's World and Coca-Cola Store
activities.description: Free to browse these iconic candy and soda stores on the Strip

activities.name: Dinner at Secret Pizza
activities.description: Hidden gem in the Cosmopolitan serving NY-style pizza by the slice

activities.name: Casino Gaming Budget
activities.description: Set aside some budget for slots or table games

activities.name: Breakfast at hotel
activities.description: Final breakfast at hotel

activities.name: The Venetian and Grand Canal Shoppes
activities.description: Explore the beautiful Venetian hotel with its indoor canal and gondolas. Free to walk around

activities.name: Lunch at Bacchanal Buffet
activities.description: Splurge on one of Vegas's best buffets for your final meal

activities.name: Paris Las Vegas Eiffel Tower Viewing Deck
activities.description: Get panoramic views of the Strip from the half-scale Eiffel Tower replica

activities.name: Last-minute souvenir shopping
activities.description: Pick up gifts and souvenirs

activities.name: Check-out and breakfast
activities.description: Quick breakfast before heading to airport

activities.name: Airport transportation
activities.description: Uber/Lyft to airport

plan.reasoning:
This itinerary successfully meets all the specified constraints:

1. **Hotel Upgrade**: The LINQ Hotel is a 3.5-star property located directly on the Las Vegas Strip, exceeding the 3-star minimum requirement. At $95/night ($380 total), it's well-priced for a Strip property.

2. **Budget**: Total cost is $1,098, which is well under the $2,500 budget, leaving $1,402 for additional spending, gambling, or savings.

3. **Flights**: Round-trip flights from LAX to LAS on Southwest Airlines total $184, which is realistic for this short route.

4. **Budget-Friendly Focus**: Despite upgrading the hotel, the itinerary maintains budget-consciousness with:
   - Free activities (Bellagio Fountains, Strip walking, Fremont Street LED show)
   - Affordable dining options (In-N-Out, Tacos El Gordo, Secret Pizza)
   - Mix of free and paid attractions
   - One splurge meal at Bacchanal Buffet balanced with budget meals

5. **Activities**: The 4-night, 5-day itinerary includes a balanced mix of:
   - Iconic Vegas experiences (Strip, Fremont Street, High Roller)
   - Natural beauty (Red Rock Canyon)
   - Entertainment and dining
   - Gaming budget allocation
   - Shopping and sightseeing

The plan provides excellent value while staying on the Strip at a quality 3+ star hotel, with plenty of budget remaining for flexibility.
plan.final_message_to_user:
I've created your upgraded Las Vegas itinerary with a 3.5-star hotel on the Strip! 

**Trip Summary:**
- **Dates**: December 10-14, 2026 (4 nights, 5 days)
- **Hotel**: The LINQ Hotel + Experience (3.5 stars, directly on the Strip) - $380
- **Flights**: Southwest Airlines roundtrip LAX-LAS - $184
- **Activities & Meals**: $534
- **Total Cost**: $1,098

You'll have **$1,402 remaining** from your $2,500 budget for additional gambling, shows, shopping, or savings!

**Highlights:**
✨ Prime Strip location at The LINQ with casino, pool, and High Roller access
🎰 Mix of free attractions (Bellagio Fountains, Fremont Street) and paid experiences
🌄 Day trip to Red Rock Canyon for natural beauty
🍔 Budget-friendly dining mixed with one splurge buffet
🎡 High Roller observation wheel ride
🎲 $100 gaming budget included

Your hotel is centrally located, making it easy to walk to most Strip attractions. The itinerary balances iconic Vegas experiences with budget-conscious choices, giving you the best of both worlds!
